purpose: Record the focused Attack Options sub-bucket pass from the strict Combat bucket.

policy.scope: This small sub-bucket covers Rapid Reaction, Quick Draw, Lightning Draw, and Improved Stun.
policy.actionSpeedMutation: When a feat clearly changes the speed/cost of an established combat action, model it as ACTION_SPEED_MUTATION metadata and provide a resolver seam for the action workflow to consume after validation.
policy.actionCompositionMutation: When a feat combines established actions into one action, model it as ACTION_COMPOSITION_MUTATION metadata and expose it through ActionSpeedFeatResolver.resolveActionComposition after validation.
policy.timingAutomation: Reaction windows and stun-specific packet mutation are exposed as structured metadata only until a dedicated workflow supplies the exact trigger/context.
policy.noBroadDamageMutation: Improved Stun metadata must not alter normal damage, non-stun attacks, or targets that are not eligible for stun effects.

implementedEntries.name: Rapid Reaction
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores reaction/timing metadata. Exact trigger and reaction availability require combat/reaction workflow context.

implementedEntries.name: Quick Draw
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes to ACTION_SPEED_MUTATION for Draw/Holster Weapon, mutating the validated action from move to swift. Includes advisory combined feat riders for Dual Weapon Mastery I and Weapon Proficiency (Lightsabers).

implementedEntries.name: Lightning Draw
implementedEntries.mechanic: Normalizes to ACTION_COMPOSITION_MUTATION. Once per encounter, if Quick Draw is present and workflow validation passes, combines drawing a holstered weapon and attacking with it into one standard action.

implementedEntries.name: Improved Stun
implementedEntries.mechanic: Stores stun-only attack metadata for stun-damage workflows. No mutation is applied to normal or non-stun attacks in this pass.
